movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: The 400 Blows
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.plot: A young boy in Paris, neglected by his parents, turns to petty crime and rebellion in this semi-autobiographical coming-of-age story.
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.reason: Truffaut's seminal work that launched the French New Wave, testing your response to critically adored foundational films.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: Les Diaboliques
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.plot: The wife and mistress of a cruel headmaster conspire to murder him, but his body disappears and strange events begin to haunt them.
movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.reason: A French thriller masterpiece from the era, testing your taste for suspense given your high ratings for 'Le Samouraï' and classic films.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.title: Belle de Jour

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.reason: A provocative French drama with psychological thrills, testing your taste for risqué themes within the channel's romance/drama blend.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.reason: Experimental short film that blends sci-fi thriller with romance, challenging your taste with unconventional storytelling.

movie-recs-prefetch-queue:1b90b4b2-25c9-.reason: A gripping prison thriller with perfect critical acclaim that matches your high ratings for tightly constructed genre films.
